name: Cignara
long_description:
Cignara provides agentic AI to automate sales sales and customer support conversations for large enterprises over voice & chat. 

Cignara focuses on turning customer interactions into business growth opportunities, such as upsells, cross-sells, churn prevention, and increasing customer LTV. Unlike other players, Cignara uniquely builds an enterprise's "AI brain" by ingesting its knowledge base, business logic, process workflows and customer profile data. This enables us to take personalized and compliant actions that directly impact revenue outcomes.
one_liner: AI agents for sales & customer support at large Fortune 500 companies
